audited_pages.title: About Apple TV Press - Apple TV Press
audited_pages.description: FAQs and highlights for Apple TV Press, the official source for press materials for Apple TV.
headings: How can I find information and Apple Original series and films?
How can I download the Apple TV logo?
How can I find publicity contact information for Apple Originals?
Where can I find press releases about Apple TV, new film and series orders, events and other news?
How can I watch Apple TV?
Shop and Learn Shop and Learn
text_blocks: What is Apple TV Press? Apple TV Press is a destination for updates and press materials for Apple Originals, including trailers, key art, images, cast and crew details, publicity contact information and the latest news about Apple TV.

How can I download the Apple TV logo? Apple TV+ is now Apple TV. You can download logo files for press needs here . For any additional press asset needs or questions around brand guidelines, please reach out to media.help@apple.com

How can I find publicity contact information for Apple Originals? Publicity contacts are listed at the bottom of each individual series or film page. A complete list of Apple Originals can be found on the Apple Originals page.

Where can I find press releases about Apple TV, new film and series orders, events and other news? To find news about Apple TV and recently announced Apple Originals, check out the latest press releases on our News page.

audited_pages.description: Apple News makes it easy to stay up to date with the news and information that matter most, with a seamless reading experience across your devices.
headings: A world of journalism. One trusted subscription.
The stories you need to hear. Everywhere you want to listen.
A global news source. Personalized for you.
Read, listen, and play Apple News on your favorite devices.
Extra. Extra. Apple News+ delivers more.
Update to the latest version of iOS or macOS to start your Apple News+ free trial.
Stay close to what’s happening close to home.
The hard-hitting, fast- breaking sports news you need.
text_blocks: A world of journalism. One trusted subscription.
Access top stories from over 500 leading publications.
Get the latest news from local, national, and international titles.
Solve daily puzzles created exclusively for Apple News+.
Listen to the week’s best articles with Apple News+ audio stories.
Share your subscription with your family for free.
Get 3 months of Apple News+ free with the purchase of an eligible device. 1
New subscribers get 1 month of Apple News+ free, then pay $12.99 per month.
Bundle Apple News+ with five other great services for one low monthly price. Learn more
Rewriting the reading experience.

Apple News+ includes original mini and full-size crossword puzzles, ranging in difficulty from easy to challenging. New crosswords are available daily, and you can take on past games from the archive.
The stories you need to hear. Everywhere you want to listen.
A global news source. Personalized for you.
Stay close to what’s happening close to home.
Get all the latest news from local publications in a growing number of cities — with coverage on politics, sports, dining, culture, and more.
The hard-hitting, fast- breaking sports news you need.
Get highlights, scores, and schedules for professional and college teams and leagues. Apple News+ unlocks access to The Athletic, Sports Illustrated, local newspapers, and more.
The feed that feeds your interests.
As you read, Apple News gets a better understanding of your interests and suggests relevant stories that you can easily find throughout the app.
Apple News only uses on-device intelligence to recommend stories and doesn’t access your information without your permission. We never share it with others or allow advertisers to track you.
Read, listen, and play Apple News on your favorite devices.
Extra. Extra. Apple News+ delivers more.
Hundreds of magazines and leading newspapers
Local news from top regional sources

audited_pages.title: Batteries - Service and Recycling - Apple
audited_pages.description: Learn about battery service and recycling for Apple devices. All rechargeable batteries need to be serviced eventually.
headings: Use Apple or an authorized service provider for service.
Shop and Learn Shop and Learn
text_blocks: All rechargeable batteries have a limited lifespan and may eventually need to be serviced or recycled. Your own battery’s lifespan will vary depending on how you use your device as well as the settings you choose for it.
Use Apple or an authorized service provider for service.

If you need to charge your battery more and more frequently, it might be time to service it. For products with built-in lithium-ion polymer batteries, the batteries should be serviced by Apple or an authorized service provider.

Your battery is designed to retain up to 80% of its original capacity at 1000 complete charge cycles. The one-year warranty includes service coverage for a defective battery. If it is out of warranty, Apple offers a battery service . Prices and terms may vary.

Your battery is designed to retain up to 80% of its original capacity at 400 complete charge cycles. The one-year warranty includes service coverage for a defective battery. If it is out of warranty, Apple offers a battery service . Prices and terms may vary.

Your battery is designed to retain up to 80% of its original capacity at 1000 complete charge cycles. The one-year warranty includes replacement coverage for a defective battery. Apple offers a battery replacement service for all MacBook , MacBook Air , and MacBook Pro notebooks with built-in batteries.
We’ll handle your battery responsibly.
Learn more about Apple’s recycling program

Join a team and inspire the work.

We aren’t merely creating products. We’re creating something magical for the person who uses it.
Join our community and help define it.
Explore a collaborative culture of inclusion, growth, and originality, supported by resources that make a difference in your life.
At Apple, you can unapologetically be yourself and grow and thrive.
Search for what you love to do.
Our values are part of everything built here — including careers.

Privacy We design Apple products to protect your privacy and give you control over your information. Learn about privacy at Apple

audited_pages.title: Contact - How to Contact Us - Apple
audited_pages.description: We aim to provide great customer service. For product inquiries, technical support, and legal questions, here are all the ways you can contact Apple.
headings: Get Financing for You, Your Business, or Your School
text_blocks: Apple.com is a convenient place to purchase Apple products and accessories from Apple and other manufacturers. You can buy online or call 1-800-MY-APPLE (1-800-692-7753) .
You can get information about an order you placed on the Apple Online Store through the Order Status page. If you prefer, you can also get order status or make changes by phone at 1-800-692-7753 .
Shop with SignTime ASL Support
American Sign Language (ASL) interpreters are available for all your online shopping needs, right in your web browser. Connect to an interpreter
Experience the digital lifestyle at any of the Apple Retail Stores around the country. Find store hours and contact information for all locations.
Get Financing for You, Your Business, or Your School
Apple Financial Services offers financing on Apple products for consumers, educational institutions, and businesses. Speak with your Apple representative to learn more.
Visit our Apple Consultants Network page to find a consultant in the U.S. or Canada.
If you are a business or professional user, visit the Apple Store for Business or call 1–800–854–3680.
Corporate and Government Sales:
Apple Enterprise Sales (877) 412–7753
Apple Government Sales (877) 418–2573
If you are a student or teacher, visit the Apple Store for Education or call 1–800–692–7753 .

If you are buying on behalf of an educational institution, visit the Apple Store for Education Institutions or call 1–800–800–2775 , 7 days a week from 9 AM to 6 PM central time 7 days a week from 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. Central time.
Find Apple Authorized Resellers
Use our Reseller Locator to find an Apple Authorized Reseller in the U.S.
Apple Authorized Resellers offer industry expertise, multiplatform services, and Mac-based solutions for a wide variety of organizations.
Find Authorized Training Providers
Visit the Apple Training website for information on available courses and Apple Authorized Training Providers worldwide.
North American Corporate Contacts
Reseller Referral (Resellers, Trainers, Consultants) 1-800-538-9696
Apple Store (Consumer and Education Individuals) 1-800-MY-APPLE (1-800-692-7753)
Apple Store (Consumer and Education Individuals) 001–800–MY–APPLE (001–800–692–7753)
Apple Store (Small Business) 001–800–692–7753

audited_pages.title: Apple Leadership - Jennifer Newstead - Apple
audited_pages.description: Jennifer Newstead is Apple’s senior vice president and general counsel, and a member of Apple’s executive leadership team. Learn more about Jennifer.
headings: Senior Vice President and General Counsel
Shop and Learn Shop and Learn
text_blocks: Senior Vice President and General Counsel

Jennifer G. Newstead is senior vice president and general counsel at Apple, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Jennifer serves on the company’s executive team and oversees all legal matters, including corporate governance, intellectual property, litigation and securities compliance, global security, and privacy.

Jennifer was a partner for 12 years at Davis Polk & Wardwell LLP, where she advised global corporations on a wide variety of issues. She holds an AB from Harvard University and a JD from Yale Law School. Following law school, she served as a law clerk for Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer.

audited_pages.title: (PRODUCT)RED - Apple
audited_pages.description: Since 2006, Apple has partnered with (RED) to help the Global Fund’s fight against AIDS and to provide millions of people with lifesaving care.
headings: AIDS isn’t over. Neither is our fight.
Apple-supported grants have provided millions of people with lifesaving services.
The Global Fund has made huge strides in the fight against AIDS.
We’ve donated over a quarter of a billion dollars where it matters most.
The AIDS pandemic still affects underrepresented communities.
Shop and Learn Shop and Learn
text_blocks: Powerful partnership. Lifesaving impact.
Since 2006, Apple and (RED) have been committed to fighting AIDS. Our contributions go directly to the Global Fund, helping provide millions of people with lifesaving care. *
AIDS isn’t over. Neither is our fight.
Learn more about our (PRODUCT)RED partnership
The Global Fund has made huge strides in the fight against AIDS. Since 2002, 70 million lives have been saved in more than 100 countries.
We’ve donated over a quarter of a billion dollars where it matters most. The Global Fund uses 100 percent of our contributions to finance AIDS programs.
The AIDS pandemic still affects underrepresented communities. Programs support the most at-risk communities, such as women and children, across sub-Saharan Africa.
Apple-supported grants have provided millions of people with lifesaving services.

Open this page on iPhone to download your choice of eight free Apple Watch faces to match your favorite (PRODUCT)RED watch band. Requires iOS 26 or later and Apple Watch SE (2nd generation), Apple Watch Series 6 or later, or Apple Watch Ultra or later with watchOS 11 or later.
Exactograph Add Apple Watch face
Reflections Add Apple Watch face
World Time Add Apple Watch face
Metropolitan Add Apple Watch face
Typograph Add Apple Watch face
Solar Analog Add Apple Watch face

Privacy We design every product and service to help keep your data safe and secure. Learn more

text_blocks: Learn how to integrate Apple Music, App Store, Apple TV, Apple News, Apple Books, Apple Podcasts, and other content into your marketing programs.
Follow these guidelines on how to use approved badges when promoting Apple’s services in marketing communications.
Apple Music Identity Guidelines
Apple Books Identity Guidelines
Apple News Identity Guidelines
iTunes Store Identity Guidelines
Apple Arcade Identity Guidelines

Promote content on Apple Books, Apple Music, Apple Podcasts and Apple TV with our self-service tools. Easily add your affiliate token to links and create assets including playable widgets, QR codes, badges and more.
The Performance Partners Program

Our affiliate program, now called the Performance Partners Program, provides a unique way for your website or app to link to Apple Services content and to earn commissions on qualifying Apple Music memberships as well as sales of movies, tv shows, books, audiobooks and more.
We currently only accept a limited number of partners who can drive significant volume and quality performance. Learn more about requirements and get answers to questions about the program.
Get additional resources and learn best practices on how to market content.

Supplier Responsibility We believe in a safe, respectful, and supportive workplace for everyone. Learn about supplier responsibility at Apple

audited_pages.title: Contact - How to Contact Us - Apple
audited_pages.description: We aim to provide great customer service. For product inquiries, technical support, and legal questions, here are all the ways you can contact Apple.
headings: Get Financing for You, Your Business, or Your School
text_blocks: Apple.com is a convenient place to purchase Apple products and accessories from Apple and other manufacturers. You can buy online or call 1-800-MY-APPLE (1-800-692-7753) .
You can get information about an order you placed on the Apple Online Store through the Order Status page. If you prefer, you can also get order status or make changes by phone at 1-800-692-7753 .
Shop with SignTime ASL Support
American Sign Language (ASL) interpreters are available for all your online shopping needs, right in your web browser. Connect to an interpreter
Experience the digital lifestyle at any of the Apple Retail Stores around the country. Find store hours and contact information for all locations.
Get Financing for You, Your Business, or Your School
Apple Financial Services offers financing on Apple products for consumers, educational institutions, and businesses. Speak with your Apple representative to learn more.
Visit our Apple Consultants Network page to find a consultant in the U.S. or Canada.
If you are a business or professional user, visit the Apple Store for Business or call 1–800–854–3680.
Corporate and Government Sales:
Apple Enterprise Sales (877) 412–7753
Apple Government Sales (877) 418–2573
If you are a student or teacher, visit the Apple Store for Education or call 1–800–692–7753 .

If you are buying on behalf of an educational institution, visit the Apple Store for Education Institutions or call 1–800–800–2775 , 7 days a week from 9 AM to 6 PM central time 7 days a week from 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. Central time.
Find Apple Authorized Resellers
Use our Reseller Locator to find an Apple Authorized Reseller in the U.S.
Apple Authorized Resellers offer industry expertise, multiplatform services, and Mac-based solutions for a wide variety of organizations.
Find Authorized Training Providers
Visit the Apple Training website for information on available courses and Apple Authorized Training Providers worldwide.
North American Corporate Contacts
Reseller Referral (Resellers, Trainers, Consultants) 1-800-538-9696
Apple Store (Consumer and Education Individuals) 1-800-MY-APPLE (1-800-692-7753)
Apple Store (Consumer and Education Individuals) 001–800–MY–APPLE (001–800–692–7753)
Apple Store (Small Business) 001–800–692–7753
